title: Schauwerk useful pilot and product surfaces
goal: Advance Schauwerk from a verified Miro/registry foundation to a useful, reviewable and durable visual operator, presentation and publication layer.
completion: Declared live and static sources reconstruct useful software and education views without becoming source truth.
Productive managed-region writes pass Regie review, exact-scope apply, postflight verification and restore gates.
Presentation and public publication outputs are reproducible, privacy-checked and usable offline.
Adapter failure, provider outage and faulty mutation have visible, tested recovery paths.
